雨纪 (Rainy Day)

Navigate a mysterious girl through a flooded isometric city by activating light sources to recede water and reveal pathways. Tap lanterns, steles, and crystals to manipulate the environment, chain light activations, and solve puzzles across multiple levels. Collect hidden cores and activate dormant robots for bonus challenges. Reach the exit to complete each level and progress through the chapters.

Arrow Keys: Move girl to adjacent interactive points (lanterns, platforms, switches) | Space: Activate/interact with current light source or mechanism | Z: Toggle between available interactive points when multiple are in range | Shift: Skip to next level (for testing/debugging purposes) | Enter: Start game from start screen | Esc: Pause/unpause game | R: Return to start screen
